scope: Wire config defaults, per-session provider/model overrides, AuthBackend-managed key vending, and provider fallback ladders through runtime provider selection

rows.source: Provider profile and managed-env startup selection
requiredBehaviors: resolve provider selection from CLI, env, profile, and config in that order
resolve provider-specific default models when a provider is selected without a model
honor provider settings for API keys, base URLs, and default models
use AuthBackend-managed keys when BYOK credentials are absent
edgeCases: remote managed key vending with no provider env key

requiredBehaviors: stage and consume per-session provider/model overrides
rebuild target providers from config settings and live provider snapshots
vend managed keys through AuthBackend when a target provider lacks BYOK credentials
reject impossible provider switches without mutating the live session
edgeCases: cross-provider switch with configured key env
missing key rejection clears the pending switch

requiredBehaviors: normalize configured fallback targets into provider/model pairs
trigger fallback only after configured failure thresholds
carry fallback target provider and model into pending provider switches
preserve provider settings when fallback switches across providers
edgeCases: cross-provider fallback uses configured or managed auth
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/api/fallback-ladder.test.ts src/config/config.test.ts src/session/session.test.ts
